title: Glitter Unicorn Hair Bows for Girls - 2PCS Sparkly Pink Unicorn Bow, Cute Alligator Hair Clips Barrettes Hair Accessories for Toddler Kids Birthday Party Gift
features: PACKAGE CONTENTS :You will get 2pcs pink unicorn hair bow clips with glitter deisgn,the size is approximately 3.8 "x 3".Ideal for girls and can be used as a birthday gift, party hair decoration or Christmas sock stuffing.

SHINY PINK UNICORN DESIGN: This unicorn hair bow clip has a pink theme and combines bling's sparkling colorful glitter powder to make the entire hair clip look shiny and fashionable. Wearing it, the children immediately stood out in the crowd. This is a great hair accessory.

SAFE AND COMFORTABLECLIP-ON DESIGN: This pink Unicorn Hair Bows is a strong and gentle alligator clip that holds securely in place throughout the day. The clip is covered with a smooth material to prevent hair pulling and ensures maximum comfort even when worn for long periods of time. They are easy to open and close, can be quickly and easily shaped, and are suitable for children and parents.

LASTING QUALITY MATERIALS: These adorable hairpins are made of durable plastic and metal materials that withstand the wear and tear of daily use. The glitter on the unicorn design will not fade or peel off easily. These clips are strong and will not bend or break easily,

VERSATILE FOR DIFFERENT HAIRSTYLES：These girls alligator clips are incredibly versatile when it comes to hairstyling. They can be easily clipped onto ponytails, braids, or even used to adorn a half-up, half-down style.
